title: Bako's Tweaks and Optimizations
description: Vulkanmod based modpack focusing on improving performance and overall usability. Things WILL break from time to time due to Vulkanmod not being stable.
body:
# Bako's Tweaks and Optimizations

A vulkanmod based modpack intended for improving framerates and general usability.

Mods that use OpenGL do **not** work. For example, Essentials will NOT work.
